verified.name: Church Calendar
verified.tagline: Catholic liturgical day, season and feast lookups as JSON
verified.description: Returns the Roman Catholic liturgical calendar for any date: the season, week number, weekday and the day's celebrations with their liturgical colour and rank. Multiple language calendars are available in the path. Served over plain HTTP only.
verified.notes: HTTP only (no TLS on api host).

verified.name: Hebrew Calendar
verified.tagline: Convert Gregorian dates to the Hebrew calendar as JSON
verified.description: Hebcal's converter turns any Gregorian date into its Hebrew-calendar equivalent, returning the Hebrew year, month and day plus the Hebrew-script date and any Torah portion or holiday that falls on it. Pass cfg=json to get structured output. The wider Hebcal API also covers Shabbat and holiday times.

verified.name: Magic The Gathering
verified.tagline: Query Magic: The Gathering cards and sets, no key needed
verified.description: A keyless REST API over the complete Magic: The Gathering card database. Filter cards by name, type, set, colour, rarity and more, getting back mana cost, rules text, artist, printings and format legality. Every request returns clean JSON.

cards.name: Black Lotus
cards.text: {T}, Sacrifice Black Lotus: Add three mana of any one color.

verified.name: Zippopotam.us
verified.tagline: Postal code to place, coordinates and region, keyless
verified.description: Look up a postal code in any of dozens of supported countries and get back the place name, state/region and latitude/longitude. The path is simply the country code and postcode. No key, no signup, JSON out.

verified.name: Harry Potter Characters
verified.tagline: Harry Potter character data with houses, wands and images
verified.description: Returns the cast of the Harry Potter world with species, house, ancestry, wand details, patronus, actor and a portrait image URL. Filters exist for students, staff and individual houses. The original Heroku host is retired; the live service now runs on Render.
verified.notes: Candidate's herokuapp.com host is dead; verified live at hp-api.onrender.com.

verified.name: Nexchange
verified.tagline: Supported currencies and pairs for a crypto exchange API
verified.description: The public endpoints of the n.exchange automated crypto-exchange list every supported currency with its limits, network, decimals and withdrawal fee, plus which trading pairs it participates in. This currency listing needs no key or auth. Order creation elsewhere in the API is a separate, authenticated flow.

verified.name: GrünstromIndex
verified.tagline: Hourly green-power forecast for German postcodes
verified.description: The Corrently GSI (Grünstromindex) endpoint forecasts the share of renewable electricity for a German postal code hour by hour, alongside wind/solar values, a CO2 estimate and an indicative energy price. Pass a zip code and get a JSON forecast array. Usage is governed by a fair-use policy, with paid tiers for higher limits.

sampleJson.support: If you have any question please contact dev@stromdao.com or visit https://premium.corrently.de/

verified.name: PostcodeData.nl
verified.tagline: Dutch postcode + house number to street and coordinates
verified.description: Resolves a Dutch postcode and house number into the street, city, municipality, province and both RD and WGS84 (lat/lon) coordinates. Pass type=json for structured output. Served over plain HTTP only.
verified.notes: HTTP only (no TLS); a ref parameter is required.

verified.name: Open Government, Canada
verified.tagline: Search Canada's open-data catalogue via the CKAN API
verified.description: The Government of Canada's open-data portal exposes a standard CKAN API, so you can search and page through tens of thousands of federal datasets and read their full metadata as JSON. No key is required for reads. Data is published under the Open Government Licence – Canada.

verified.name: City, Gdynia
verified.tagline: Gdynia (PL) open-data catalogue over a CKAN API
verified.description: The Polish city of Gdynia publishes its open data through a standard CKAN API, listing datasets that cover live public-transport arrivals, routes, timetables and more. The package_list endpoint returns dataset slugs as JSON with no key. Individual datasets are fetched by name from the same API.

verified.name: Data.parliament.uk
verified.tagline: UK Parliament linked-data: bills, members, votes and more
verified.description: The UK Parliament Linked Data API serves datasets on bills, members, divisions, attendance and petitions. Append .json to any resource path to get JSON, with paging controlled by query parameters. Content is available under the Open Parliament Licence.
verified.notes: Legacy Linked Data API (lda.data.parliament.uk); still live.

verified.name: PurgoMalum
verified.tagline: Profanity filter as a service, keyless JSON in and out
verified.description: Pass any text and PurgoMalum returns it with profanity and obscenity removed or masked, using a built-in word list you can extend. The JSON service returns a simple result field. No key, no signup, GET only.

skipped.name: owo
skipped.reason: Link obfuscator is POST-only to create links; GET /api returns 404, no keyless JSON data endpoint.

skipped.name: Breaking Bad
skipped.reason: DNS no longer resolves (breakingbadapi.com dead).

skipped.reason: Heroku app is gone (404, free Heroku dynos retired).

skipped.reason: GraphQL endpoint requires a POST query; no keyless GET JSON.

skipped.name: Steem

skipped.name: SHOUTCLOUD

skipped.name: Chinese Character Web

skipped.name: Jservice

skipped.name: GeoNames

skipped.name: City, Prague Open Data

skipped.name: Food Standards Agency
skipped.reason: Requires a mandatory x-api-version header; a plain keyless GET returns 404.

skipped.name: INEI
